spec_reference: ADR-0008 (art medium: full Amano illustration, owner override of the spec pixel clause)
notes: active_profile selects how render_engine composites and validates. The owner chose full Amano illustration (ADR-0008), so 'illustration' is active.
The 'pixel' profile is retained verbatim (the original spec behaviour) so a hybrid pixel side-line is a one-word switch.
Real illustration art is authored at master_px; other output sizes are LANCZOS-resampled from it. Bump master_px to 4000 and author there if maximum fidelity at 4000 is required (heavier).
